sourcesContent:
const MyRoom = ({ student, rooms, students }) => { // ✅ Added students here // Student ka room find karo const myRoom = rooms.find(room => room.id === student?.roomId); // Available rooms count const availableRooms = rooms.filter(room => room.capacity > room.occupants.length).length; if (!student) { return (

Student data not found

Please contact admin

); } return (
{/* Header */}

Welcome, {student.name}! 👋

Here's your hostel information and profile details

{/* Two Column Layout */}
{/* Left Column - Profile Details */}
{/* Profile Card */}
{student.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}

{student.name}

{student.email}

🎓 Student

📋 Personal Information

Full Name: {student.name || "-"}
Email Address: {student.email || "-"}
Phone Number: {student.phone || "Not provided"}
Course: {student.course || "Not provided"}
Year: {student.year || "Not provided"}
Registration Date: {student.registeredOn || new Date().toLocaleDateString()}
{/* Quick Stats */}

📊 Quick Stats

{student.roomId ? "✅" : "❌"}
Room Status
{student.roomId ? "Assigned" : "Not Assigned"}
{availableRooms}
Available Rooms
Open for booking
{/* Right Column - Room Details */}

🛏️ My Room Details

{myRoom ? (
🏠
Room {myRoom.id}
{myRoom.type || "Standard Room"}
Room Number: {myRoom.id}
Capacity: {myRoom.capacity} persons
Current Occupants: {myRoom.occupants?.length || 0}
Vacancies: 0 ? "#10b981" : "#ef4444" }}> {myRoom.capacity - (myRoom.occupants?.length || 0)} spots left
Assigned On: {student.assignedOn || "Not assigned"}
{myRoom.occupants?.length > 0 && students && (

👥 Roommates

{myRoom.occupants.map(occupantId => { const occupant = students?.find(s => s.id === occupantId); if (!occupant) return null; return (
{occupant.name?.charAt(0)}
{occupant.name}
{occupant.course || "Student"}
); })}
)}
) : (
🏠

No Room Assigned Yet

You haven't been assigned a room yet. Please contact the admin or browse available rooms.

)}
); }; export default MyRoom;
